title: Beans' Toolbelt
description: A balanced tool belt mod to clean up the hotbar while building or exploring
body:
Beans' Toolbelt is a simple to use, straight to the point Tool Belt Mod that adds a balanced way to keep your hotbar clean. Looking at a block and swinging your hand, you will automatically equip the quickest tool in the toolbar. It's that simple.

![Using the ToolBelt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4aEg65B2/images/2ecf0f3a0000b4081de14263f3c4f76d35b15dc9.gif)  ![New Tool Belt Slots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4aEg65B2/images/893a99bcc302d360834fb1b4c768c6d651a649e7.png)

With config you are able to adjust the amount of slots a player has or by using /attribute
